prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the query result cache: the cache key generation, the cache backend abstraction (in-memory vs Redis), the cache TTL policy, and the cache invalidation on dashboard save.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the query result cache: the cache key generation, the cache backend abstraction (in-memory vs Redis), the cache TTL policy, and the cache invalidation on dashboard save.
